description_long: This is a matte black ceramic cup with a cylindrical body and a rounded handle attached to one side. The front of the cup features bold white text reading 'GET SHIT DONE' in uppercase letters, accompanied by three checkboxes, each with a checkmark, arranged vertically to the left of the text. The handle is robust and smoothly integrated into the cup's body, providing a comfortable grip. The cup's interior is also black, matching the exterior, and the rim is slightly thickened for durability. There are no visible chips, cracks, or additional decorative elements aside from the text and checkboxes. The overall design is modern and motivational, suitable for urban environments such as offices, cafes, or home kitchens.
description: A matte black ceramic cup with a motivational slogan and checkboxes in white, featuring a sturdy handle and a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white 'GET SHIT DONE' text and three checkboxes, with the handle visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side view focused on the handle, with part of the text barely visible on the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain black surface and the handle on the left, with no text or decoration.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the three checkboxes vertically, with the handle not visible.
